evals.prompt: show me top movers by marketing channel this week vs last week — use sessions as the metric
evals.expected_output: An HTML report at /tmp/cja_top_movers_report_<timestamp>.html with: (1) summary KPI cards showing total items compared, biggest gainer, biggest decliner, new entries count, and disappeared count; (2) a Gainers table sorted by absolute delta descending; (3) a Decliners table sorted by absolute delta ascending; (4) a New Entries & Disappeared section; (5) a Full Comparison Table. A 3-line inline text summary is also delivered (e.g., 'Top gainer: Direct +46 sessions (+3.8%). Top decliner: Affiliate −24 (−22.6%). Natural Social disappeared from the rankings.').

evals.prompt: what pages gained or lost traffic vs last week? use page views
evals.expected_output: The skill uses findDimensions to resolve PageName (variables/web.webPageDetails.name), runs two runReport calls with limit 50 for this week and last week, joins the results, computes delta and pctChange for each page, identifies New Entry pages (in Period A but not B), Disappeared pages (in B but not A), and generates the HTML watchlist report at /tmp/cja_top_movers_report_<timestamp>.html with top 10 gainers and top 10 decliners.

evals.prompt: which products are rising or falling in orders this month compared to last month?
evals.expected_output: The skill resolves a product dimension (e.g., product name or category) and orders metric, runs reports for this month and last month with limit 50, computes deltas, classifies items as gainers/decliners/new/disappeared, and generates the HTML top movers report. Products with status 'New Entry' (appeared in top 50 this month but not last) and 'Disappeared' are highlighted separately.
